creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
IMHO no. If new FET appears the oldest version moves into directory 'old' so can't find in ' http://lalescu.ro/liviu/fet/download/'.
But I don't understand why doesn't match. I've delete the downloaded fet-5.26.0.tar.bz2 and rerun 'make makesum' - the size and sha256sum is same as in patch - tried it again.
